index.hero_eyebrow: South Florida Real Estate · Est. in Palm Beach County
index.hero_headline: Trusted South Florida real estate, done right.
index.hero_sub: Betty Benzino has led 5 Star Realty with 20+ years of experience. Our team is ready to help buyers, sellers, landlords, and tenants throughout South Florida.
index.intro_heading: A trusted South Florida brokerage with 20+ years of experience in residential real estate.
index.intro_body_1: 5 Star Realty is a licensed brokerage serving buyers, sellers, landlords, and tenants across South Florida. You work directly with our team — no call centers, no handoffs.
index.intro_body_2: Whether you're buying, selling, or looking for a rental, you'll get honest guidance and consistent communication from people who know this market.
index.services_note: Buying, selling, renting, or getting a home valuation — you deal with our team directly, every step of the way.
index.service_buy_body: Tell us what you're looking for and we'll find homes that match. We negotiate on your behalf and walk first-time buyers through every step.
index.service_sell_body: Priced right from day one — professional photos, targeted marketing, and most listings under contract within a month.
index.service_rent_body: We serve both tenants and landlords with fast, straightforward residential rentals across South Florida.
index.service_valuation_body: A free, no-obligation estimate based on current comparable sales in your neighborhood — no guesswork.
index.mls_heading: Search active listings across South Florida.
index.meet_heading: Betty Benzino — 20+ years of experience helping South Florida with real estate.
index.meet_body_1: Clients return to Betty because she's honest, available, and gets results. As one reviewer said, she's "the heart and soul of this brokerage."
index.meet_body_2: 5 Star Realty was built on that same commitment — personal service from a team that genuinely cares about the outcome.
index.review_1_quote: "Her knowledge, experience, honesty and integrity were excellent. I followed all her advice and quickly made a sale in the price range she advised. She kept constant communication and was always responsive. I cannot say enough to praise Betty and 5 Star."
index.review_2_quote: "After working closely with Betty, we found our perfect home and moved with no hassle or stress. She's always available and goes above and beyond. She treats clients like long-time friends. Highly recommend."
index.review_3_quote: "Betty went over and above with our house buying. She made the process easy, and we'll be using her again with pleasure when we sell our current house. Six stars."
index.review_4_quote: "Excellent customer service and knowledge of the market. I've done multiple transactions with the company and always closed within a month. I would not hesitate to recommend them."
index.review_5_quote: "My wife and I purchased a home with Betty and it was a fantastic experience. Everything from beginning to end was smooth. She worked extra hard to be sure we were satisfied and explained everything."
index.review_6_quote: "We relocated to Florida and called 5 Star Realty. It was a blessing — excellent, friendly, helpful and professional service. I'd highly recommend them to anyone."
index.cta_title: Ready to make a move? We're here.
index.cta_sub: Call or email for a free consultation — no cost, no obligation.

team.hero_subtitle: Our Broker has 20+ years of experience and our team of Realtors is dedicated to serving clients across South Florida.
team.founder_quote_text: The heart & soul of this brokerage.
team.founder_bio: 5 Star Realty specializes in residential real estate for sellers, buyers, landlords and tenants in South Florida. Our Broker has 20+ years of experience and our team of Realtors are ready to help our customers with all their Real Estate needs.
team.roster_lede: Hand-selected. Mentored by Betty. Each one committed to the same standard of service.
team.value_1_desc: We tell the truth — even when it costs us the deal. That's what earns trust.
team.value_2_desc: From the first showing to the closing table — every detail handled like it's our own home.
team.value_3_desc: Clients become long-time friends. Our team operates like one — and treats yours the same.
team.value_4_desc: Calls returned within hours. Questions answered fast. You'll never wonder where things stand.
team.voice_1_text: Betty Benzino, owner of 5 Star Realty, is the heart & soul of this high performing real estate brokerage firm. Recognized for the volume of deals her firm consummates annually.
team.voice_2_text: Excellent customer service and knowledge of the market. I've done multiple transactions with the company and always closed the deals within a month. I would not hesitate on recommending them to others.
team.voice_3_text: Professional dedicated Broker. Fully attentive and honest Broker. Highly recommended!
team.voice_4_text: I needed a place to rent so I asked them for help. Their service was quick and hassle free. I highly recommend using them!
team.voice_5_text: This is the right way to offer real estate services.
team.join_text: We welcome licensed Florida Realtors who believe in honest, attentive service. If that sounds like you, reach out — we'd love to talk.
team.cta_title:
Work with a team
that puts clients first.
team.cta_subtitle: Give us a call — Betty answers directly and the conversation is always free.

contact.header_title:
Get in touch with
5 Star Realty.
contact.header_sub: Whether you're buying, selling, or renting, Betty is available by phone and email. No obligation to reach out.
contact.intro_heading: We're here when you need us.
contact.intro_text: Betty personally responds to every inquiry. You can expect to hear back within 24 hours — usually the same day.
contact.area_note: Palm Beach · Boca Raton · Delray · West Palm · Jupiter
contact.form_sub: Fill in the details below and Betty will get back to you directly.
contact.form_disclaimer: Your information stays private. We'll only use it to respond to your inquiry.
contact.faq_1_answer: No. Initial consultations and home valuations are always free. We only earn when you successfully buy or sell — there's no risk in reaching out.
contact.faq_2_question: What areas of Florida do you serve?
contact.faq_2_answer: We serve buyers and sellers throughout Florida, with deep expertise in Palm Beach County including Boca Raton, Delray Beach, West Palm Beach, Jupiter, and surrounding luxury markets.
contact.faq_3_question: How quickly can I expect a response?
contact.faq_3_answer: Betty personally responds to every message within 24 hours, often the same day. Phone calls during business hours typically reach her directly.
contact.faq_4_question: Do you work with first-time buyers?
contact.faq_4_answer: Absolutely. First-time buyers get extra time and patience — we walk you through every step, explain every document, and make sure you feel confident at the closing table.
contact.faq_5_question: Can you help me sell remotely?
contact.faq_5_answer: Yes. We handle every part of selling — staging, photography, showings, and closing — even if you're out of state. Digital signatures and video calls keep it simple from anywhere.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_p1: 5 Star Realty ("we," "us," or "our") operates this website at 5starrealtyfl.com. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you visit our site or contact us about real estate services.
privacy.intro_p2: We take your privacy seriously. We do not sell your personal information to third parties — ever.
privacy.section1_p1: We collect information you voluntarily provide when you contact us:
privacy.section1_li1: Your name, phone number, and email address
privacy.section1_li2: Property details or preferences shared in your message
privacy.section1_li3: Any other information you choose to include in a contact form or email
privacy.section1_p2: If you accept cookies, we may also collect anonymous website usage data such as pages visited, time on site, and general geographic location (city/region level only). This data is never tied to your name or contact details.
privacy.section2_p1: We use the information you provide solely to:
privacy.section2_li1: Respond to your real estate inquiry, showing request, or valuation question
privacy.section2_li2: Follow up about properties or services you asked about
privacy.section2_li3: Improve how our website works (analytics only, and only if you consent)
privacy.section2_p2: We will never use your information to send unsolicited marketing emails, share it with other businesses, or contact you about anything unrelated to your original inquiry.
privacy.section3_p1: When you first visit our site, we ask for your permission to use cookies. Here is what each type does:
privacy.section3_li1: Essential cookies — Always active. These remember your preference (light or dark theme) and whether you have responded to this cookie notice. They do not track you.
privacy.section3_li2: Analytics cookies — Only active if you click "Accept all." These help us understand how visitors use the site so we can improve it. No personal details are collected.
privacy.section3_p2: If you click "Decline," only essential cookies are used and no tracking of any kind takes place.
privacy.section4_p1: Our website uses a small number of third-party tools:
privacy.section4_li1: BeachesMLS / FlexMLS — Powers the live property search on our Search MLS page. Their embed is governed by their own privacy policy. We do not control the data collected by their widget.
privacy.section4_li2: Google Fonts — Loads typefaces for our site. Google may log the request, but no personal data is sent.
privacy.section4_li3: Cloudflare CDN — Delivers animation libraries. Cloudflare may log anonymized request data per their privacy policy.
privacy.section5_p1: Any information you send through our contact form is received directly in our email inbox. We do not store contact form submissions in a database. We use standard email security practices and do not retain your data beyond the period needed to assist you.
privacy.section6_li1: Ask what personal information we hold about you
privacy.section6_li2: Request that we delete any information you have shared with us
privacy.section6_li3: Withdraw cookie consent at any time using the button above
privacy.section6_li4: Opt out of further contact by replying to any email we send you
privacy.section6_p2: If you are a California resident, you have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA). We do not sell personal information and do not share it with third parties for commercial purposes, so most CCPA provisions are satisfied by default.
privacy.section7_p1: Our site is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has submitted information to us, please contact us and we will delete it promptly.
privacy.section8_p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will update the effective date at the top of this page. Continued use of the site after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.section9_p1: Questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your information? Reach out directly:
privacy.section9_li3: Brokerage: 5 Star Realty, South Florida, Licensed Florida Brokerage
privacy.copyright_line: © 2026 5 Star Realty · All rights reserved · Licensed Florida Brokerage
